Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails using search_emails (query: "open house" or "Zillow", folder_name: "SENT") to discover Keisha Williams's February 2026 outbound batch - 18 first-touch open-house emails (subjects like "Great meeting you at the open house", "Following up from the Eastover/Cornelius/Dilworth/Waxhaw open house", "Open house follow-up - mortgage options") and 11 first-touch Zillow emails (subjects like "Your Zillow mortgage inquiry", "Following up from Zillow", "Zillow inquiry follow-up - <name>"), for 29 first-touch outbound emails total (the search in SENT returns 31 results including 2 reply-sends from Keisha back to the two leads who replied). The broader 79 Feb outbound items Keisha sent (social / website / office-visit nurture) are out of scope.
OE 2: Search emails using search_emails (query: "open house" or "Zillow", folder_name: "INBOX") or walk threads via list_mailboxes, get_email_threads, and get_thread to find inbound replies whose parent_id is one of the 31 in-scope outbound IDs. Exactly two replies exist: email_900476 from anthony.lewis@gmail.com (parent email_900125, "Re: Great meeting you at the open house", 2026-02-14) and email_900441 from eugene.reyes@gmail.com (parent email_900209, "Re: Your Zillow mortgage inquiry", 2026-02-20).
OE 3: Use get_email_by_id (email_id: "email_900441" and "email_900476") to read each reply body and extract the specific question each lead raised. Eugene Reyes asked about a $375K property on Randolph Rd that has been sitting on the market for a couple weeks, a monthly-payment estimate at 10-20% down, and Keisha's fastest pre-approval turnaround. Anthony Lewis is looking in the Mooresville area at $325-450K, has ~$40K saved for a down payment, low-to-mid 700s credit for both partners (healthcare and tech), and said the mortgage process feels intimidating.
OE 4: Use mortgage_los_get_borrower (email: "eugene.reyes@gmail.com" and "anthony.lewis@gmail.com") or mortgage_los_search_borrowers (query: "Reyes" or "Lewis") to confirm neither replier has converted into an active loan file. Both return no borrower record, so both stay in scope for the write actions.
OE 5: Use crm_search_leads (full_name: "Eugene Reyes" and "Anthony Lewis") to retrieve the CRM lead IDs and confirm both are still in nurture. Expected matches: Eugene Reyes as crm_lead_2156665fd14f (status "contacted", rating "warm") and Anthony Lewis as crm_lead_57f8f582cc7b (status "contacted", rating "warm").
OE 6: Send an email using send_email (sender: "keisha.williams@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["eugene.reyes@gmail.com"]) with a personal follow-up that references the $375K Randolph Rd property Eugene asked about and offers a concrete next step - a refreshed monthly-payment scenario at 10-20% down or a pre-approval call with a turnaround commitment.
OE 7: Send an email using send_email (sender: "keisha.williams@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["anthony.lewis@gmail.com"]) with a personal follow-up that references Anthony's Mooresville $325-450K search, acknowledges the $40K down payment / mid-700s credit context and his "mortgage process feels intimidating" concern, and offers a concrete next step such as a pre-approval call or a sample rate scenario.
OE 8: Use crm_update_lead_status (id: "crm_lead_2156665fd14f", status: "qualified") to bump Eugene Reyes's CRM lead from "contacted" to "qualified".
OE 9: Use crm_update_lead_status (id: "crm_lead_57f8f582cc7b", status: "qualified") to bump Anthony Lewis's CRM lead from "contacted" to "qualified".

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 28, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
